nasb.text: I know that the Lord will maintain the cause of the afflicted And justice for the poor.

esv.text: I know that the Lord will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and will execute justice for the needy.

cnv.text: 我知道耶和華必為困苦人伸冤， 必替窮乏人辨屈。

ccb.text: 我知道耶和华必为贫穷人伸张正义， 为困苦者申冤。

csbs.text: 我知道耶和华为困苦人施行判决， 也为贫穷人施行公正。
